programme.desc: The Dirt Dogs go to Kalgoorlie to process the gold from their Heap Leach. Meanwhile, Ted and Lecky's daughter, model and jewellery designer Tyler, joins their hunt for pay dirt. S2/Ep10

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff attends a shelter to help the pets of disadvantaged and homeless owners. And, at the clinic, Max the dog needs treatment for a growth on his head. S4/Ep15

programme.title: Life at Vet University
programme.desc: The students are halfway through their spring semester rotations. Lindsay has a hectic week treating a mare and foal for pneumonia. S1/Ep3

programme.title: Expedition X
programme.desc: The team investigate bizarre cattle mutilations. The baffling deaths make Jessica and Phil question if the cattle were victims of newly arrived predators. S2/Ep1

programme.desc: Pro surfer, Anastasia Ashley, and YouTuber, Cory Williams are stranded in the jungles of Belize. Do they have what it takes to survive without food, water or clothes? S3/Ep9
